name: Scottish Eggs with Fresh Herbs
recipeInstructions:
1. Hard-boil the eggs by covering them in cold water, bringing to a boil, simmering gently for 9 minutes, and cooling under cold running water.
2. Mix sausage meat with spring onions and herbs, seasoning well.
3. Shell cooled eggs and coat each one with seasoned flour.
4. Divide sausage meat into four portions, patting on a floured surface to shape (approximately 5x3 inches).
5. Place an egg in the center of each piece, gathering up sausage meat to cover completely.
6. Seal each by first dipping in beaten egg and then thoroughly and evenly in breadcrumbs.
7. Heat oil for deep frying up to 350-375°F (175-190°C).
8. Fry eggs in hot oil for 6-8 minutes, turning frequently until browned.
9. Drain on crumpled greaseproof paper.
10. Wrap in cling wrap when completely cold and store.
